title: Charms
description: A compact mod that adds charms with potion effects on them. Usable by holding in your off hand or by putting them in craftable containers.
body:
What is Charms?

Charms is a compact mod inspired by potion fingers that adds charms with potion effects on them. The charms can be used by holding in your off hand by putting them in craftable containers or in the Curios API charm slots! The "Charm Base" item is found in loot chests and is used in all charm recipes. There is a charm for almost any potion effect and some with a second level. There are also fun Custom Charms that add effects not found in vanilla potions.

 

The art is by AOCAWOL and gives this mod a fun, vanilla feel.

 

Thank you for checking out my mod i hope it is helpful for your Minecraft experience.

 
CURIOS API IS REQUIRED!!!!!
 

 

Join my discord! https://discord.gg/gmsrrcb78R
